content.Text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 00:07 PDT] Add a new module called "SmartContextCompressor" to app.js in this browser-based AI chat app. Follow the EXACT same IIFE revealing-module pattern used by all other modules (e.g., ConversationDriftDetector, ConversationMoodRing, etc.).

## What This Feature Does
Smart Context Compressor proactively monitors conversation token usage and provides:
1. A floating context gauge showing current estimated token usage vs model limit
2. Proactive toast warnings when context is getting large (70%, 85%, 95% thresholds)
3. One-click "Compress" action that summarizes older messages into a condensed form
4. A panel (toggled via Alt+Shift+C) showing:
   - Visual gauge bar of context usage (green/yellow/red)
   - Per-message token estimates with ability to mark messages as "compressible"
   - Compression history log
   - Auto-compress toggle that automatically compresses when hitting 85%
   - Compression ratio stats

## Implementation Details

### Token Estimation
Use a simple heuristic: ~4 chars per token (same approach as ConversationManager uses). Get model context limits from ChatConfig if available, otherwise default to 128000 tokens.

### Compression Algorithm
- Extract key information from older messages (first sentence, code blocks, key terms)
- Replace verbose messages with "[Compressed] {summary}" format
- Keep the most recent N messages untouched (configurable, default 10)
- Preserve all code blocks verbatim
- Preserve user messages more than assistant messages

### UI Panel
Create an overlay panel (same style as other panels like ConversationMoodRing, DriftDetector) with:
- Header: "🗜️ Context Compressor" with close button
- Gauge bar showing usage percentage
- Current stats: tokens used, tokens available, compression ratio
- Message list showing per-message token estimates with checkboxes
- Buttons: "Compress Now", "Auto-Compress: ON/OFF", "Reset"
- Compression history showing past compressions with timestamps

### Integration
- Register keyboard shortcut Alt+Shift+C with KeyboardShortcuts
- Register with CommandPalette: "context compressor"
- Register slash command: /compress
- Show a small floating indicator in bottom-right showing token usage % (only when > 50%)
- Use ToastManager for warnings
- Observe chat-output with MutationObserver for new messages
- Use SafeStorage for persistence of settings

### CSS
Add all styles inline in the module using a <style> tag injection pattern (create a style element and append to head), same as other modules do. Use the app's CSS variable theming (var(--bg), var(--text), var(--accent), var(--border), etc.).

### Key Constraints
- Pure vanilla JS, no external dependencies
- IIFE revealing-module pattern returning { toggle, show, hide, compress, analyze }
- Append the module at the END of app.js
- DO NOT modify any existing code - only append
- The module should be self-contained

### Build Verification
After writing, run: node -c app.js
This must pass before you're done.
